name: Walton Stark
sentence: Known as Walton the Moon King, he was a King in the North and is buried in Winterfell's crypt.

name: Wat (Night's Watch)
sentence: Brother of Jack-Be-Lucky, sent to the Wall to serve in the Night's Watch.

name: Wat (orphan)
sentence: An orphan from the War of the Five Kings taken in by the Heddles at the Inn at the crossroads.

name: Wat (sailor)
sentence: A crew member of the Brazen Monkey who approached Cat of the Canals in Braavos.

name: Wat (Standfast)
sentence: A peasant of House Osgrey in the Reach during Aerys I's reign, trained by Duncan the Tall for a war over the Chequy Water.

name: Will (orphan)
sentence: An orphan boy taken in by the Heddles at the crossroads inn alongside Wat and other War of the Five Kings orphans.

name: Will (squire)
sentence: A gawky squire of Ser Uthor Underleaf during Aerys I's reign, born around 192 AC.
